lead.queueSubtitle: BR-01 Lead Firewall: only LS ≥ 0.60 with valid contact become active tasks. Leads below threshold stay in auto-nurturing.

leadDetail.title: Lead detail
leadDetail.rematchBanner: Re-matching: property updated — matches re-evaluated. Existing deal is NOT auto-cancelled (BR-05).
leadDetail.assignModalDesc: Selected agent gets an active task (BR-04: max 3/agent). LEAD_ASSIGNED event audit-logged.
leadDetail.toastRecomputeDesc: Fresh signals: WhatsApp interaction + match updated.
leadDetail.toastAssignDesc: Task added to queue. LEAD_ASSIGNED audit-log written (BR-07).

property.portfolioSubtitle: Property Score (PS) §7.2 BRD · Listing Freshness LF = 1 − min(1, days/90).

deal.title: Kanban pipeline
deal.subtitle: 6 stages · DP (Deal Probability) and DHI (Deal Health Index) under each card. Drag-drop is active — grab a card and drop on another column. ← / → buttons remain as a11y fallback.
deal.legendSubtitle: TF default 0.70 (BR-10) when expected_close_date is unknown.
deal.confirmDesc: Irreversible (rollback requires manager override). Will emit DEAL_WON + COMMISSION_GENERATED.
deal.toastWonDesc: Agent APS recomputed + commission generated. DEAL_WON written to audit-log.

dashboard.subtitle: You have {active} / 3 active tasks (BR-04). {hot} leads await decision in next 15 min (SLA HOT).
dashboard.queueTodayDesc: Lead Firewall (BR-01) filters leads below LS 0.60.

manager.title: Manager dashboard
manager.subtitle: APS leaderboard, active escalations, override rights (BR-11).

admin.title: Admin tenants
admin.subtitle: RBAC 5 roles (BR-12 single session). Only manager/admin see this section (DP-05).

login.demoNotice: Demo · M0 walkthrough · click "Continue" to enter the dashboard.
login.footer: Single session per agent (BR-12). © 2026 REVYX · ITPRO SYSTEM SRL

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Per-tenant configuration — locale, notifications, SLA override, WhatsApp integration.
settings.saveOk: Settings saved (mock — not persisted in M0).

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Personal stats, APS history, task slots (BR-04).

notifications.title: Notification feed
notifications.subtitle: Audit-logged events (BR-07) — escalations, re-matching, won deals.
